title: Deslate (Stonecut Deepslate and Stone to their cobbled variants)
description: Use the stonecutter to cut deepslate and stone to their cobbled variants and their subordinate blocks, i.e. crafting Deepslate Tilewalls from Deepslate directly
body:
Use the stonecutter to cut deepslate and stone to their cobbled variants and their subordinate blocks, i.e. crafting Deepslate Tilewalls from Deepslate directly.

![New Stonecutter Crafting Recipes of Deepslate](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/eogHTGT0/images/0876266fe15f876ca6123a3515b63338ea4598a4.png)

![New Stonecutter Crafting Recipes of Stone](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/eogHTGT0/images/09e214ceb7e8970759e233b3c387c0742421aeec.png)

If you like this pack, you might want to check out my [Woodcutter](https://modrinth.com/datapack/wood_cutter) allowing you to cut wood down to its respective blocks.
